why_now: The scheduled StackOverflow post-cooldown demand-capture job was still idle after its 2026-05-24T11:30:00+02:00 fire time.
distribution_lane_selector.py was still treating that scheduled one-shot as current for up to an extra hour, which could suppress legitimate follow-through and hide a missed high-intent slot.
Repairing the stale scheduled-run guard is a higher-leverage move than refreshing another StackOverflow packet that was already delivered in this review window.

repair.behavior_change: A scheduled StackOverflow post-cooldown run stops blocking follow-through once it is more than 3 minutes past due.

replacement_condition: If the overdue StackOverflow slot still produces no real action by the run-check window, retire the packet from active reuse and switch the next demand-capture slot to a different executable surface.
